meta.note: Quotes, news, earnings & analyst trends are live (Finnhub). Technicals are derived from live price/returns; options chains, IV and flow are modeled (no free options data).

news.headline: Boeing keeps 20-year forecast for jet demand steady, shrugs off Iran war impact - Reuters
news.summary: Boeing keeps 20-year forecast for jet demand steady, shrugs off Iran war impact  Reuters

news.headline: FAA lets Boeing sign off on 737 Max, 787 airworthiness certificates again
news.summary: The move is a vote of confidence in Boeing from the U.S. government.

news.headline: Meta's latest move in the AI talent war — plus Cramer's 4 quick hits on the market
news.summary: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

news.headline: Retail and Wall Street are underwater on SpaceX — but not going down without a fight
news.summary: Good times for SpaceX are proving short-lived as Elon Musk’s intergalactic IPO is now giving fodder to bears.

news.headline: UK police charge man over Iran-linked spying offences - Reuters
news.summary: UK police charge man over Iran-linked spying offences  Reuters

news.headline: California's billionaire tax: What's at risk for the biggest state economy in America
news.summary: California's billionaire tax would generate quick revenue, but Norway's example shows the longer-term economic impact of targeting the wealthy is unclear.

news.headline: VTI Is Cheaper Than It Used to Be. So What's the Catch?
news.summary: The entire US stock market is trading at a discount to its recent past, but the safest alternative is paying you more to wait.

news.headline: How Nvidia and Micron Are Single-Handedly Reshaping S&P 500 Tech Earnings
news.summary: Excluding the contribution from Micron and Nvidia, Q2 earnings for the rest of the Zacks Tech sector would be up +25.3% (vs. +48.8% otherwise).

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $695.33 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $743.29 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into tomorrow: Strong Bearish — favor puts / short delta.
Use QQQ $695.33 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: TSLA PUT — enter $16.84–$18.62, target $26.59+, stop $10.64.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Stocks closed lower with SPY -0.99% and QQQ -1.50%. Composite sentiment -64 (Strong Bearish). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, vix, market breadth (a/d). VIX at 17.65 (+5.3%). Environment read: favor puts / short delta. Leadership came from Energy; Communication lagged. Today's standouts: XOM +0.97%, LLY +0.85%. Laggards: NFLX -7.26%, META -2.79%. Carrying TSLA as the top idea into tomorrow (7.1/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
